constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider-originated proposals remain upstream and non-authoritative.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL validates execution, invocation, dispatch, assignment, worker identity, and chain continuity before COMPLETED.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: Completion records that the execution boundary reached a completed state without certifying result quality.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Completion record and return events are persisted as append-only replay artifacts.

known_limits: Result quality evaluation is not implemented.
Reflection and self-improvement are not implemented.
